---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, parameter, or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What's the use case? What can't you (or your AI agent) do today that this would enable?

## Proposed solution

What would the new behavior look like? If you're proposing a new tool, sketch its name, parameters, and response shape.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about, including doing nothing.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, examples from other MCP servers, or anything else relevant.
